message:
Add bitwise NOT (~), complex literals (2j), fix .build gitignore

Parser:
- Complex number literals: 2j, 3.14j now parse as float (strip j suffix)
- Decorators: @decorator syntax already implemented
- Star expressions: *args in function definitions and calls

Codegen (*args):
- Functions with *args convert to []const i64 slice parameter
- Call sites wrap arguments in slice literal
- vararg_functions map tracks which functions use *args

File size: core.zig now 543 lines (will split later)
